prompt: Create a cinematic editorial fashion photograph on a wide 16:9 canvas showing two androgynous streetwear models standing back-to-back on a barren rocky volcanic landscape at night. The models are full-body, centered slightly left of frame, posed upright and still with arms relaxed, facing opposite directions in profile/three-quarter view. Their faces are intentionally obscured by smooth vertical beige blur rectangles, making them anonymous. The left model wears a black oversized hooded technical jacket with subtle pinstripe texture, wide cropped black pleated pants, black socks, and futuristic white sculptural ribbed sneakers; a hint of red lining appears inside the hood. The right model wears a pale sage-gray oversized puffer/technical jacket with dark black panels and sporty white sleeve stripes, loose dark track pants with vertical side stripes, white socks, and matching futuristic white ribbed sneakers; their hair appears short with small blond braids visible above the collar. Surround the figures with thick rolling smoke or steam clouds, greenish-gray mist, and a dark smoky background with no visible buildings or sky details. The ground is uneven gravel, stones, and volcanic rock lit by harsh directional light from the front-left, casting dramatic shadows and highlighting the shoes and jacket textures. Use a moody high-fashion campaign style, photorealistic detail, desaturated olive-green color grading, high contrast, atmospheric haze, shallow-to-medium depth of field, cinematic lighting, no text, no logo, no watermark.
